headline: Broyhill Asset Management Sold Ball Corporation (BALL) as the Thesis Validated
summary: Broyhill Asset Management, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Broyhill Equity Composite declined 6.0% in the first quarter, net of all fees and expenses, lagging the MSCI All Country World Index, which declined 3.1%. After a strong start to the year, global stocks […]

headline: JP Morgan Upgrades Ball to Overweight, Maintains Price Target to $60
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeffrey Zekauskas   upgrades Ball (NYSE:BALL) from Neutral to Overweight and maintains the price target from $60 to $60.
